task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Department' User custom field with the correct format and list values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Redmine custom field configuration page or list showing a User custom field named 'Department'. The 'Format' must be set to 'List', and the 'Possible values' text area must contain 'Engineering', 'Sales', 'Operations', and 'HR'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Department' custom field has the correct boolean settings applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Department' custom field configuration page, ensure the checkboxes for 'Required', 'Searchable', and 'Editable' are checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Employee ID' User custom field with the correct format and length constraints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Redmine custom field configuration page or list showing a User custom field named 'Employee ID'. The 'Format' must be set to 'Text' (or string), with 'Minimum length' set to 7 and 'Maximum length' set to 7.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Employee ID' custom field has the correct regular expression and visibility settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Employee ID' custom field configuration page, the 'Regular expression' field must contain exactly '^[A-Z]{2}-\d{4}$', and the 'Visible' setting/checkbox must be enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'admin' user profile has been updated with the correct Department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user edit page for the 'admin' user. The 'Department' dropdown or selection field must be set to 'Engineering'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'admin' user profile has been updated with the correct Employee ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user edit page for the 'admin' user. The 'Employee ID' text input field must contain the value 'AD-0001'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Redmine web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Redmine Administration UI (Custom fields, Users), rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Redmine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should display the authentic Redmine interface with standard menus, headers, and styling, not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just paste the entire prompt into a random text field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must have entered specific values (e.g., 'AD-0001', '^[A-Z]{2}-\d{4}$') into their respective, correct input fields, rather than pasting large chunks of the task description anywhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Department field: format='list', values=['Engineering', 'Sales', 'Operations', 'HR'], required=true. Employee ID field: format='string' (Text), regex='^[A-Z]{2}-\d{4}$', min_length=7, max_length=7. Admin user update: Department='Engineering', Employee ID='AD-0001'.
